game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Freeways:** Players act as a freeway engineer, viewing a top-down map with pre-defined traffic entry and exit points, and use a finger to draw multi-lane road segments connecting these points. The core loop involves designing an interchange, then tapping a "Play" button to simulate traffic flow for 60 seconds, observing vehicle movement and identifying congestion points. The objective is to achieve a 3-star rating by ensuring all vehicles reach their destinations efficiently without significant traffic jams (e.g., no more than 10 cars stuck for 5 consecutive seconds), with difficulty increasing through new levels that introduce more complex layouts, higher traffic volumes (e.g., 50-150 cars per minute), and varied terrain. Successfully completing a level unlocks the next, while failure to meet efficiency targets requires redesigning the road network.
game_info.description: Design efficient freeway interchanges to manage traffic flow! Draw road segments connecting entry and exit points, then simulate traffic to see if your design can handle the load. Achieve 3-star ratings by preventing congestion and ensuring all vehicles reach their destinations. Progress through increasingly complex levels with more traffic and challenging layouts.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menu selections and scroll view during design phase
Space: Confirm road placement / Start simulation
Shift: Toggle between drawing and erasing roads
Z: Undo last road segment
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Restart and return to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic road drawing and simple traffic flow. Validates that the player can draw a basic road segment connecting entry to exit points, start simulation, and have vehicles successfully navigate the road.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Draw a direct straight road from the first entry point to the first exit point. Start simulation and wait for vehicles to complete their journeys. Monitor traffic flow and ensure no vehicles get stuck.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Vehicles should spawn at entry points, follow the drawn road, and reach exit points successfully. The test passes if at least one vehicle completes its journey without prolonged congestion and the game doesn't crash.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal interchange design to win a level. This validates the win condition by creating an efficient multi-lane network that handles all traffic flows with minimal congestion to achieve a 3-star rating.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze entry and exit point locations. Draw optimized road segments with appropriate connections between all entry-exit pairs. Create smooth merging lanes and avoid sharp turns. Start simulation and let it run to completion while monitoring the star rating.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully achieve a 3-star rating by maintaining efficient traffic flow throughout the 60-second simulation. All vehicles reach destinations without significant jams. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state and unlocks the next level.
